VerificationResult.title: VerificationResult
VerificationResult.description: Represents a single instance of a factual accuracy check performed on selected web text, storing its outcome and related details for 'chat history' or review.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VerificationResult entity.

originalText.description: The exact snippet of text selected by the user from a webpage that was submitted for factual verification.

sourceUrl.description: The URL of the webpage from which the 'originalText' was selected.

verdict.description: The AI's concise assessment of the factual accuracy of the 'originalText' (e.g., 'Likely Accurate', 'Needs Verification', 'Potentially Misleading').

suggestedCorrection.description: An optional brief correction or additional context provided by the AI if inaccuracies or ambiguities were identified in the 'originalText'.

reasoning.description: Detailed AI reasoning explaining why the specific verdict was chosen.

sources.description: Authoritative sources used to verify the claim.

checkedAt.description: The timestamp indicating when the factual verification was performed.

definition.description: Represents a user's profile or serves as the root for user-owned subcollections.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores individual factual accuracy verification results, specific to a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed the verification.

params.name: verificationResultId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific verification result document.

firestore.reasoning: Standard hierarchical user-owned data structure for secure history access.
